task_completion.description: Create partition walls to enclose the Fitting Room and Wardrobe Storage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: New walls drawn on the 2D floor plan creating distinct, enclosed spaces intended for the Fitting Room and Wardrobe Storage.

task_completion.description: Define and explicitly label four rooms: 'Cutting Room', 'Sewing Area', 'Fitting Room', and 'Wardrobe Storage'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text labels for 'Cutting Room', 'Sewing Area', 'Fitting Room', and 'Wardrobe Storage' clearly visible on the 2D floor plan.

task_completion.description: Furnish the workspace with at least 8 tables/desks and 8 task chairs/stools.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least 8 tables/desks and 8 chairs/stools placed in the 2D plan or 3D view, likely clustered in the Cutting Room and Sewing Area.

task_completion.description: Furnish the workspace with at least 8 large storage units, and the Fitting Room with at least 1 mirror and 2 armchairs/sofas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least 8 shelves/cabinets/wardrobes visible across the plan, plus at least 1 mirror and 2 armchairs/sofas specifically located within the enclosed Fitting Room.

task_completion.description: Draw at least 2 dimension lines around the large cutting tables to annotate clearances.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least 2 dimension lines (lines with measurement numbers) placed next to or around the tables in the cutting area on the 2D plan.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sweet Home 3D GUI to design the layout rather than writing a script or editing the underlying XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Sweet Home 3D application interface with the floor plan being actively edited, rather than a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Furniture items and walls are genuinely placed in the 3D modeling software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Furniture items, walls, and rooms appear correctly in both the top 2D plan view and the bottom 3D render view of the Sweet Home 3D interface.

integrity.description: The agent saved the project when complete.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialog is shown, or the main window title bar shows the filename without an asterisk (indicating no unsaved changes) in the final screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The baseline file already contains 48 walls, 19 rooms, and 14 dimensions. The agent must add at least 4 NEW walls, define 4 NEW rooms with the exact names ('Cutting Room', 'Sewing Area', 'Fitting Room', 'Wardrobe Storage'), and add at least 2 NEW dimension lines. The total furniture required is at least 8 tables/desks, 8 chairs/stools, 8 large storage units, 1 mirror, and 2 armchairs/sofas.
